name: Llama 3
summary: Meta's state-of-the-art open-weights large language model series.
use_when: General text generation, chat agents, localized semantic reasoning, code generation.
avoid_when: Zero-latency constraints on client devices (without quantization).
pros: High performance across diverse language benchmarks
Strong commercial-use license and community support
cons: High VRAM requirements for inference and fine-tuning
Requires high computing power for training from scratch
Meta Llama 3 family overview entry; prefer llama-3-8b for specific deployment guidance

key_hyperparams.name: temperature
key_hyperparams.note: Creativity parameter: lower is more deterministic, higher is more creative.

quick_start:
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained('meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B')
